subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The Silver Shadow Cave is located in Elventree and serves as the starting point of the party's current expedition.
source_quote: specifically at the Silver Shadow Cave

subject: Elventree
fact: Elventree is a known location where the party begins their journey.
source_quote: A known location where the party begins their journey

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown is a sinkhole located a half-day's journey from Hillsfar.
source_quote: A sinkhole located a half-day's journey from Hillsfar

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown serves as a familiar entrance to the Underdark.
source_quote: serving as a familiar entrance to the Underdark

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown is now partially surrounded by a wall and guarded by soldiers.
source_quote: It is now partially surrounded by a wall and guarded by soldiers

subject: The Waydown
fact: The sinkhole descends one hundred feet to a swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: The sinkhole descends one hundred feet to a swift-flowing underground river

subject: Underdark
fact: The Underdark is a vast subterranean realm characterized by natural formations, increasing patches of fungus, and perpetual darkness.
source_quote: A vast subterranean realm characterized by natural formations, increasing patches of fungus, and perpetual darkness

subject: travel to Howling Pits
fact: The party travels through rough and less worn tunnels and caves for two days to reach the Howling Pits.
source_quote: The party travels through rough and less worn tunnels and caves for two days to reach the Howling Pits

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits are known for tunnels varying between ten to thirty feet wide and just as tall.
source_quote: tunnels varying between ten to thirty feet wide and just as tall

subject: Howling Pits
fact: A maddening, howling wind is ever-present in the Howling Pits, masking sounds more than seventy-five feet away.
source_quote: A maddening, howling wind is ever-present, masking sounds more than seventy-five feet away

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits contain large caves, treacherous deep pits, an underground river, and various dangerous fungi and creatures.
source_quote: The area contains large caves, treacherous deep pits, an underground river, and various dangerous fungi and creatures

subject: Fire Giant Cave
fact: The Fire Giant Cave is a large, dark cave within the Howling Pits where two mutated fire giants ambushed the party.
source_quote: A large, dark cave within the Howling Pits where two mutated fire giants ambushed the party

subject: Fire Giant Cave
fact: The giants hide behind stalactites in the Fire Giant Cave.
source_quote: The giants hide behind stalactites

subject: Deep Pits Section
fact: The Deep Pits Section is a treacherous part of the Howling Pits littered with dangerously deep pits.
source_quote: A treacherous section of the Howling Pits littered with dangerously deep pits

subject: flying over Deep Pits
fact: The party had to fly across the Deep Pits Section to avoid falling.
source_quote: The party had to fly across this area to avoid falling

subject: Underground River Cave
fact: The Underground River Cave is a wide cave in the Howling Pits bisected by a fifteen-foot wide, swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: A wide cave in the Howling Pits, bisected by a fifteen-foot wide, swift-flowing underground river

subject: Underground River Cave
fact: The banks of the Underground River Cave are covered in strange gray and white fungi known as Cave Creepers.
source_quote: Its banks are covered in strange gray and white fungi known as Cave Creepers

subject: Cave Creepers
fact: Cave Creepers are fungi that can drive people mad if touched.
source_quote: that can drive people mad if touched

subject: Yellow Mold Tunnel
fact: The Yellow Mold Tunnel is a tunnel within the Howling Pits peppered with patches of poisonous yellow mold.
source_quote: A tunnel within the Howling Pits peppered with patches of poisonous yellow mold

subject: navigating Yellow Mold Tunnel
fact: The party had to navigate the Yellow Mold Tunnel by holding their breath to avoid the toxic cloud of spores.
source_quote: the party had to navigate by holding their breath

subject: Cloaker Tunnel
fact: The Cloaker Tunnel is a narrow passageway within the Howling Pits that constricts to only five feet wide in places.
source_quote: A narrow passageway within the Howling Pits that constricts to only five feet wide in places

subject: Cloaker Tunnel
fact: The ceiling of the Cloaker Tunnel rises to thirty feet.
source_quote: with a ceiling rising to thirty feet

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim refuses to lead the party through the narrow passage.
source_quote: Bramgrim refuses to lead the party through the narrow passage

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim points to Daein and suggests he go first.
source_quote: pointing to Daein and suggesting he go first

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim expresses concern that the tight passageway with high ceilings would be an ideal place for an ambush from above.
source_quote: Bramgrim expresses concern that the tight passageway with high ceilings would be an ideal place for an ambush from above

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim suggests that Akritas cast Pass Without Trace again.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggests that Akritas cast Pass Without Trace again

subject: Daein
fact: Daein uses his investigation skills and rolls a twenty-four.
source_quote: Daein uses his investigation skills and rolls a twenty-four

subject: Daein
fact: Daein spots bat-like creatures lurking in the tunnel.
source_quote: spotting bat-like creatures lurking in the tunnel

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas identifies the creatures as cloakers.
source_quote: Akritas identifies the creatures as cloakers

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace

subject: Akritas
fact: The entire party rolls high on their stealth checks after Akritas casts Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: the entire party rolls high on their stealth checks

subject: cloaker evasion
fact: The party successfully sneaks past the cloakers, avoiding a dangerous encounter.
source_quote: The party successfully sneaks past the cloakers, avoiding a dangerous encounter

subject: reaching cave edge
fact: The party reaches the edge of the cave safely.
source_quote: reaching the edge of the cave safely

subject: Murssvayas
fact: Murssvayas provided the party with accurate directions and a map for their journey through the Underdark.
source_quote: An individual who provided the party with accurate directions and a map for their journey

subject: Murssvayas
fact: Murssvayas's directions led the party directly to their destination without problems.
source_quote: The directions proved reliable, leading the party directly to their destination without problems

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: Two nervous guards in splint armor, shields, longswords, and short bows are stationed at The Waydown.
source_quote: Two nervous guards in splint armor, shields, longswords, and short bows stationed at The Waydown

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: The Red Plume soldiers recognize the party as the heroes who saved Hillsfar from demonic possession.
source_quote: They recognize the party as the heroes who saved Hillsfar from demonic possession

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: The Red Plume soldiers express their reluctance to venture into the Underdark themselves.
source_quote: They express their reluctance to venture into the Underdark themselves

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral is the commander of the Red Plumes.
source_quote: The commander of the Red Plumes

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral previously helped a group of adventurers in the Underdark.
source_quote: who previously helped a group of adventurers in the Underdark

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral has returned to Hillsfar with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes.
source_quote: He has since returned to Hillsfar with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral left only two soldiers to guard The Waydown.
source_quote: leaving only two soldiers to guard The Waydown

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is the party's animal companion and martial sidekick.
source_quote: The party's animal companion and martial sidekick

subject: Magical Gloves (Owlbear)
fact: The Owlbear is enhanced with magical gloves that grant a plus one bonus to attack and damage.
source_quote: Enhanced with magical gloves that grant a plus one bonus to attack and damage

subject: Magical Gloves (Owlbear)
fact: The magical gloves make the Owlbear's claw attacks magical.
source_quote: The gloves make the Owlbear's claw attacks magical

subject: Magical Gloves (Owlbear)
fact: The magical gloves provide a plus one bonus to both attack rolls and damage.
source_quote: provide a plus one bonus to both attack rolls and damage

subject: Magical Gloves (Owlbear)
fact: The magical gloves were crafted for the Owlbear at a cost of one hundred gold pieces.
source_quote: crafted for the Owlbear at a cost of one hundred gold pieces

subject: Owlbear combat
fact: The Owlbear participates in combat, attacking fire giants with its magical claws.
source_quote: attacking fire giants with its magical claws

subject: Owlbear navigation
fact: The Owlbear successfully navigates environmental hazards throughout the journey.
source_quote: successfully navigating environmental hazards throughout the journey

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: Two mutated fire giants are encountered in a large cave within the Howling Pits.
source_quote: Two fire giants encountered in a large cave within the Howling Pits

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: The mutated fire giants show clear signs of madness.
source_quote: showing clear signs of madness

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: One mutated fire giant possesses leathery wings too small for flight.
source_quote: One possesses leathery wings too small for flight

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: The other mutated fire giant has an extra eye.
source_quote: while the other has an extra eye

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: The mutated fire giants are aggressive and powerful, capable of devastating attacks with their greatswords.
source_quote: They are aggressive and powerful, capable of devastating attacks with their greatswords

subject: fire giant retreat
fact: After the party fled, the giants laughed and returned to lying down in their cave.
source_quote: After the party fled, the giants laughed and returned to lying down in their cave

subject: Cloakers
fact: Cloakers are mysterious and intelligent bat-like predators of the Underdark.
source_quote: Mysterious and intelligent bat-like predators of the Underdark

subject: Cloakers
fact: Cloakers lurk in narrow tunnels with high ceilings.
source_quote: that lurk in narrow tunnels with high ceilings

subject: Cloakers
fact: Cloakers descend from above to attack their prey.
source_quote: They descend from above to attack their prey

subject: Cloakers
fact: Cloakers use darkvision to hunt.
source_quote: using darkvision to hunt
